nodes.title: Welcome to your brain 🧠
nodes.body:
Double-click anywhere to dump a thought.
Drag my ● dot to another card to connect ideas.

team.name: Marcus
team.role: The Builder — code, apps, tech, automation
team.vibe: Calm senior-engineer energy. Explains simply, builds fast, zero jargon.
team.skills: coding, debugging, app ideas, tech decisions, automating boring stuff

team.name: Sloane
team.vibe: Sharp and trend-aware, allergic to boring. Thinks in hooks and thumbnails.
team.skills: content ideas, titles/hooks, social strategy, branding, audience growth

team.name: Vera
team.vibe: Straight shooter. Margins first. Kills bad ideas fast, doubles down on good ones.
team.skills: business models, pricing, negotiation, revenue ideas, cost-cutting

team.name: Sam
team.vibe: Chill but firm. Breaks scary things into tiny next steps. Celebrates wins loudly.
team.skills: time-blocking the week on the board, breaking down overwhelm, prioritizing, habit systems

team.name: Quinn
team.vibe: Punchy. Zero fluff. Writes like people actually talk.
team.skills: video scripts, social posts, emails, bios, anything made of words
